summary: Iteration 307 - Download Bug Fix & Timer Updates VERIFIED. All primary fixes confirmed: (1) DownloadWithExpiry.js uses fetch→blob→download pattern - NO window.open or target='_blank' in component, (2) WaitingWithGames shows estimatedTime='4-7 minutes' in ComicStorybookBuilder, (3) generationStartTime state variable added and 'Generated in Xm Ys' displayed after completion. Minor finding: ComicStorybookBuilder.js still has target='_blank' in 2 other download functions (lines 626, 1270) - not blocking but could be improved.

minor_findings.issue: Lines 626 and 1270 still use target='_blank' for handleDownload and cover image download - different from DownloadWithExpiry component
minor_findings.note: These are NOT in DownloadWithExpiry component which was the primary fix target. May want to apply same fetch→blob pattern for consistency.

critical_code_review_comments: DownloadWithExpiry.js (lines 20-58): Uses fetch(downloadUrl) → response.blob() → URL.createObjectURL(blob) → a.click() → URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl) - CORRECT PATTERN
DownloadWithExpiry.js: NO window.open, NO target='_blank' in handleDownload function - VERIFIED via grep
ComicStorybookBuilder.js (line 430): generationStartTime state variable exists - VERIFIED
ComicStorybookBuilder.js (line 579): setGenerationStartTime(Date.now()) called when generation starts - VERIFIED
ComicStorybookBuilder.js (lines 1206-1209): 'Generated in Xm Ys' calculation and display - VERIFIED
WaitingWithGames.js (line 399): Displays estimatedTime prop as 'Estimated: {estimatedTime}' - VERIFIED
WaitingWithGames.js (line 402): Displays elapsed time counter - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Download bug fix verified in DownloadWithExpiry.js - uses fetch→blob pattern. Timer updates verified - estimatedTime='4-7 minutes' and 'Generated in Xm Ys' after completion. Note: ComicStorybookBuilder.js has 2 other target='_blank' usages in lines 626 and 1270 (not in DownloadWithExpiry) that could be improved for consistency.

DownloadWithExpiry_fetch_blob_pattern.evidence: Lines 28-38: fetch(downloadUrl) → response.blob() → URL.createObjectURL(blob) → a.click() → URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl)

DownloadWithExpiry_no_target_blank.evidence: grep -n 'target.*_blank|window.open' returns NO matches for DownloadWithExpiry.js

DownloadWithExpiry_no_window_open.evidence: grep search confirmed no window.open in DownloadWithExpiry.js

generated_in_display.evidence: Lines 1206-1209: Shows 'Generated in Xm Ys' after COMPLETED status using (Date.now() - generationStartTime)

step1_genre_selection.evidence: UI test confirmed Step 1 renders with genre selection, all 8 genres visible (kids_adventure, superhero, fantasy, comedy, romance, scifi, mystery, horror_lite)

gallery_regression_check.evidence: Gallery page shows real thumbnails, 10+ images visible

explore_regression_check.evidence: Explore page shows 74 creations with real thumbnails
